Design System v0.8.0
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Layout

List-Row Component

Flexibles rich List-Item: Leading (Avatar/Icon) + Body (Title + Subtitle/Meta) + Trail (Badge/Action). Universell: Bookings, Customers, Activity-Feed, Settings-Lists.

Beispiele

AN
Anna Meier
09:00 – 09:45 · Haarschnitt
12 Buchungen
Bestätigt
HTML anzeigen 
<div class="list">
  <div class="list-row">
    <div class="list-row__lead"><span class="avatar avatar--c3">AN</span></div>
    <div class="list-row__body">
      <div class="list-row__title">Anna Meier</div>
      <div class="list-row__subtitle">09:00 – 09:45 · Haarschnitt</div>
    </div>
    <div class="list-row__meta">12 Buchungen</div>
    <div class="list-row__trail">
      <span class="badge badge--success">Bestätigt</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--list-row-px Optional —
--list-row-py Optional —
--list-row-bg Optional —
--list-row-hover-bg Optional —
--list-row-divider Optional —

Modifier

  • .list-row--compact — reduziertes Padding
  • .list-row--interactive — mit cursor: pointer + stärkerer Hover
  • .list--bordered — starker Divider zwischen Rows
  • .list--plain — kein Container-Border/Background (nur Rows)
Source-CSS ansehen
